title: Define lichend DAO admission policy
description: Choose and specify how the production border router durably admits DAO origin identities. Announce TOFU pinning alone is insufficient and automatic first-seen admission would create a new security policy. Define operator provisioning, trust upgrade/revocation, persistence, and failure behavior before lichend activates the RPL root.
acceptance_criteria: A reviewed policy identifies admission authority, durable record format, provisioning and revocation flows, restart behavior, and fail-closed handling; implementation-ready acceptance vectors are defined.
notes: HUMAN: What exact operator provisioning, durable record format, trust upgrade/revocation, persistence, and fail-closed behavior for lichend DAO origin admission (beyond TOFU)? Policy decision blocks implementation.
